rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA AS INDENTURED VS. NOEMI LYKKEBERG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2011, line 1. Defendant¿s Motion to Set Aside Judgment is granted, subject to opposition. = (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: ALLA SNEPER AS TRUSTEE OF THE ALLA SNEPER 1993 VS. STEPHEN COOK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Enforce The Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2011, line 2. Defendant¿s Motion to Enforce Settlement Agreement is denied. Defendant¿s and Plaintiff¿s requests for attorney¿s fees are denied. = (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIOANL TRUST COMPANY, VS. WILLIAM BAILES et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2011, line 5. Plaintiff¿s Motion for Summary Judgment is continued to 11/23/2011 on Court¿s own motion. = (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: ING BANK FSB VS. FERNANDO TORREZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2011, line 4. Defendant Memjivar¿s Demurrer is sustained with 5 day leave to amend for Plaintiff to clearly plead (i) compliance or exemption from San Francisco Rent Ordinance, and (ii) if the action is brought against tenants and subtenants, and if so, to plead the proper service of notice on such persons. = (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: 676 GEARY STREET, LLC VS. FRANK ENGLISH et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2011, line 3. Defendant¿s Demurrer is off calendar. Action dismissed on 11/09/2011. = (501/CEAK)
